name: Zoho CRM
description: A cloud-based customer relationship management platform providing sales, marketing, and support automation with extensive REST APIs and SDKs.

auth_methods.note: Zoho CRM uses OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code, self-client, refresh token); API requests use Bearer tokens. No public GraphQL or basic auth documented.

credential_access.note: Developers can sign in to the Zoho API Console to create OAuth clients or self-clients and generate client ID/secret and grant tokens without needing partner approval. API usage is subject to edition limits; additional units can be purchased.

api_surface.note: Zoho CRM exposes a broad REST API (v2/v8), covering modules like Leads, Contacts, Accounts, Deals, Products, Quotes, Bulk APIs, search, fields, layouts, attachments, etc.

buildability.note: Public REST APIs and OAuth credentials can be obtained via the API Console; documentation and SDKs are available, so integrations can be built today. API rate limits depend on CRM edition and may require purchasing additional API units for high-volume usage.

queries: Zoho CRM API documentation developer site:zoho.com/crm/developer/docs
Zoho CRM API pricing site:zoho.com "Zoho CRM" API pricing limits "API"
